strengths: 20+ years of hands-on engineering across diverse domains (web, mobile, embedded, data integration) satisfies the 15-year experience threshold with room to spare
Current role at re:cinq includes direct AI-agent infrastructure work and MCP framework development, demonstrating timely engagement with agentic AI tooling
Demonstrated entrepreneurial track record via GISCollective founding, open-source platform delivery, and community knowledge-sharing through talks, workshops, and code dojos
concerns: No formal AI/ML credentials (no Master's or PhD in an AI-related field) and AI exposure is recent and tooling-level rather than reflecting deep strategic or research expertise
Career arc is consistently that of a hands-on individual contributor and developer; no evidence of director-level responsibilities, executive advisory work, or influencing product strategy at scale

Skills inventory and project history show limited cloud platform depth — a single AWS CDK reference and no explicit mention of large-scale cloud architecture, ML frameworks (PyTorch, TensorFlow), or AI platform design
response.justification: The candidate is a seasoned polyglot engineer with broad technical range and genuine engagement with AI-agent tooling in their current role, but the Principal Engineer (AI Strategy) position calls for a recognized AI thought leader with demonstrated cloud platform expertise, strategic customer advisory experience, and director-level influence — none of which are evidenced in this resume. The absence of formal AI credentials, combined with a career that has remained firmly in individual hands-on delivery rather than strategic leadership, creates a significant gap relative to the seniority and domain depth the role requires.
